title: megalastrum macrothecum
intro: Megalastrum macrothecum, also known as the large-fruited Megalastrum, is a species of fern in the family Osmundaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Megalastrum macrothecum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal benefits, which may include reduced pain and improved digestion.
